perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a red bucket hat and white sweater stands in a warehouse store holding two large cans of Campbell's soup. She smiles broadly and gestures excitedly towards the product. (2) She brings the cans closer to the lens to show the label clearly, then points upwards to a price tag on a shelf. (3) The camera alternates between close-ups of the soup cans and shots of her enthusiastically explaining the deal while holding them in her hands. (4) She finishes with a thumbs-up and continued energetic gestures while standing in front of stacks of the same product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout. (2) A female voice speaks in an enthusiastic, high-pitched tone in Mandarin Chinese, joined occasionally by a male voice off-screen who sounds equally excited and affirming. (3) The dialogue is fast-paced with occasional sound effects like 'pings' or 'dings' that emphasize key points. (4) Ambient warehouse store noise is very low, suggesting a dedicated microphone was used.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top; '終於等到你' (Finally waited for you); '蛤蜊濃湯' (Clam Chowder) in large yellow/white blocks. (2) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles reflecting the spoken dialogue. (3) Hook Text: '折了80元 275元' (80 yuan discount, now 275 yuan) appearing with a sparkle effect; '可以撐到下一次世界大戰為止' (Can last until the next world war) used as a humorous exaggeration of the product's shelf life/quantity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Reveal -> Price/Value Proposition -> Usage Suggestion -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on screen; 1 male voice off-camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman with pigtails wearing a red Kangol bucket hat and a white ribbed sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Stacks of canned soup on industrial shelving inside a Costco warehouse.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Deal Reveal -> Product Benefits -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform followers about a significant discount on Campbell's Clam Chowder at Costco and highly recommend they stock up due to its value and taste.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is actively holding the product, pointing to the discounted price, and verbally encouraging viewers to buy it.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature red bucket hat and high-energy delivery style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes classic social media 'deal-hunting' tropes with high-contrast text and enthusiastic vocal delivery to drive engagement.
